source_file: Altumint-TM001(02) Flashing Light Video Monitor Assembly Instructions-240326-194800.pdf

text_blocks.text: Before placing the solar charge controller on the plate, make a note of the factory pin and serial number printed on the label on the top of the device. This will be used later to configure settings with the VictronConnect app.
text_blocks.label: list_item

text_blocks.text: Attach solar charge controller to top left of plate using QTY four (4) 6-32 socket head cap screws.
text_blocks.label: list_item

text_blocks.text: Attach PoE injector to middle left of plate using QTY four (4) 4-40 phillips truss head screws.
text_blocks.label: list_item

figures.caption: Full page screenshot — page 3 of Altumint-TM001(02) Flashing Light Video Monitor Assembly Instructions-240326-194800.pdf
figures.label: page_screenshot

full_text: Before placing the solar charge controller on the plate, make a note of the factory pin and serial number printed on the label on the top of the device. This will be used later to configure settings with the VictronConnect app. Attach solar charge controller to top left of plate using QTY four (4) 6-32 socket head cap screws. Attach PoE injector to middle left of plate using QTY four (4) 4-40 phillips truss head screws.
